name: Adhesive Bin Labels with Paper Cards Multipack, Teacher Supplies - up&up
description:
Easily identify your bins with the help of these Bin Labels with Paper Cards from up&up™. This pack of 10 transparent bin labels includes pink, blue, green, white and purple cards to give you multiple labeling options. Complete with self adhesive backs, these bin labels are easy to attach and use.

up&up™: We believe making smart choices for the people, places, and pets in your life should be easy and affordable. And, having quality you can trust should be a given. That’s why you can count on our promise – caring for your everyday in every way.

Satisfaction guaranteed – Love it or your money back.
